reason: PRD M4 specifies cloud fallback triggers on timeout >5s or 3 consecutive errors with 60s auto-restore, but llm.js only triggers fallback on immediate Ollama error. The architecture documents the current behavior (error-only fallback). PRD should either be updated to match implementation or the implementation gap should be explicitly tracked.
proposedChange: Clarify in PRD M4 section 1 whether the timeout/consecutive-error/auto-restore behavior is required for the current milestone or deferred. Current implementation: Ollama error → immediate cloud fallback, no timeout threshold, no error counting, no auto-restore timer.
